title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 18 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 18 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 18 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 18/09/2023
DCE iron ore futures declined by 0.17 % today, the main contract closed at 871.5 .The traders' willingness to ship is low.The steel mills are wait and see. The overall trading sentiment of the market is less. SSF at Shandong port deal 842 yuan/mt, PBF at Tangshan port deal 952yuan/mt,.
